selection_rationale.CXCR3: CXCR3 is a human Th1-associated chemokine receptor and trafficking marker; it is preferentially expressed by polarized Th1 cells and supports responsiveness to CXCR3 ligands, but is not Th1- or CD4-specific.
selection_rationale.TBX21: T-bet, the Th1 master transcription factor
selection_rationale.IL12RB2: IL12RB2 encodes the signaling IL-12 receptor beta-2 chain, which is selectively enriched in human Th1 versus Th2 cells and is induced during Th1-polarizing activation; do not describe it as required for Th1 commitment on this evidence.

CXCR3.source_title: Differential expression of chemokine receptors and chemotactic responsiveness of type 1 T helper cells (Th1s) and Th2s.
CXCR3.exact_locator: Full text, Results and Discussion, paragraph beginning 'We generated Th1 and Th2 lines'; Figure 2B (CXCR1-4 Northern blot), Figure 3 (antigen-specific Th1 versus Th2 clones), and Figure 4 (IP-10 chemotaxis).
CXCR3.species_lineage_scope: Polarized human cord-blood T-cell lines plus antigen-specific human Th1 and Th2 clones
CXCR3.claim_scope_limit: Supports preferential Th1 association and chemotaxis, not lineage identity; CXCR3 is also expressed by activated CD8, NK, and other CXCR3-positive CD4 states.
CXCR3.bounded_rationale: CXCR3 is a human Th1-associated chemokine receptor and trafficking marker; it is preferentially expressed by polarized Th1 cells and supports responsiveness to CXCR3 ligands, but is not Th1- or CD4-specific.
CXCR3.located_support_summary: CXCR3 expression was selective for polarized human Th1 cells with a reported 6.7-fold Th1-versus-Th2 difference, confirmed in antigen-specific clones; IP-10 induced greater Th1 chemotaxis.

TBX21.source_title: A novel transcription factor, T-bet, directs Th1 lineage commitment.
TBX21.exact_locator: Szabo 2000 abstract: 'isolation of T-bet, a Th1-specific T box transcription factor'
TBX21.claim_scope_limit: T-bet also in CD8/NK/B; lineage-defining TF not CD4-exclusive
TBX21.bounded_rationale: T-bet is the primary-supported Th1 master TF; high-T-bet marks a Th1-type program, not CD4 identity.

IFNG.source_title: A novel transcription factor, T-bet, directs Th1 lineage commitment.
IFNG.exact_locator: Szabo 2000 abstract: 'hallmark Th1 cytokine, IFNgamma; T-bet expression correlates with IFN'
IFNG.claim_scope_limit: pan-effector cytokine: CD8/NK/NKT and general activation
IFNG.bounded_rationale: IFNG association with the Th1 program is primary-supported; it is not CD4- or Th1-specific.

IL12RB2.source_title: Selective expression of an interleukin-12 receptor component by human T helper 1 cells.
IL12RB2.exact_locator: Full text, Results section 'Selective Expression of the IL-12R beta2 Chain in Th1 Cells'; Figure 3A-B (Th1 versus Th2 lines and clones), Figure 4 (activation and cytokine regulation), and Figure 5 (IL-12 binding).
IL12RB2.species_lineage_scope: Human Th1 and Th2 lines and clones; activation and cytokine polarization of human naive T cells
IL12RB2.claim_scope_limit: Directly supports selective expression, regulation, high-affinity IL-12 binding, and IL-12 responsiveness. It does not establish that IL12RB2 is universally required for human Th1 commitment.
IL12RB2.bounded_rationale: IL12RB2 encodes the signaling IL-12 receptor beta-2 chain, which is selectively enriched in human Th1 versus Th2 cells and is induced during Th1-polarizing activation; do not describe it as required for Th1 commitment on this evidence.
IL12RB2.located_support_summary: IL-12R beta-2 transcripts were selectively expressed in established human Th1 but not Th2 lines and clones; activation induced the transcript, IL-12 enhanced it, and IL-4 suppressed it. High-affinity IL-12 binding was detected in Th1 lines.

sampling.rule: 50 lowest hashes per occupied marker bin, no replacement

bins_sha256_superseded.note: Historical mean-display hash from the Phase-1 build; the original per-gene bin assignments were never persisted and cannot be reconstructed. Frozen bins are now the committed stage01_bins_v3.csv (method_version stage1-continuous-v3.0.1). Equivalence to the original proven on occupied marker bins: marker_bins + candidate_counts match the checkpoint and all 2,100 controls reconstruct byte-for-byte. Scores/coefficients byte-unchanged.

selection_rationale.IL4: IL4 is a human Th2-associated cytokine frequently coexpressed with IL13; use it as a type-2 cytokine-program component, not as a lineage-exclusive marker or as proof of a master-driver state.
selection_rationale.IL5: IL5 is a human Th2 effector cytokine enriched in a minority, more highly differentiated Th2 subpopulation; it is not a universal Th2 marker.
selection_rationale.IL13: IL13 is a human Th2-associated effector cytokine frequently coexpressed with IL4; use it as a type-2 cytokine-program component, not a lineage-exclusive marker.

PTGDR2.source_title: Selective expression of a novel surface molecule by human Th2 cells in vivo.
PTGDR2.exact_locator: Nagata 1999 abstract: 'expressed by Th2 but not Th1 lineage cells, named CRTH2'
PTGDR2.claim_scope_limit: among CD4 fairly Th2-restricted; also ILC2/eosinophils/basophils
PTGDR2.bounded_rationale: CRTH2/PTGDR2 is a primary-supported human Th2 surface marker; specific within CD4 but shared with ILC2/granulocytes.

IL4.source_title: Hierarchical IL-5 expression defines a subpopulation of highly differentiated human Th2 cells.
IL4.exact_locator: Full text, Results section 'IL-5 expression is restricted to a minority subpopulation of IL-4+, IL-5+, IL-13+ Th2 cells'; Figure 1A-I, especially 1B and 1D-G.
IL4.species_lineage_scope: Ex vivo and stimulated human CD4 T cells, allergen-specific responses, and short-term human Th2 lines from healthy and allergic donors
IL4.claim_scope_limit: Supports expression within human Th2 responses. IL4 is also produced by Tfh and other immune cells, and RNA abundance does not by itself demonstrate a causal differentiation role.
IL4.bounded_rationale: IL4 is a human Th2-associated cytokine frequently coexpressed with IL13; use it as a type-2 cytokine-program component, not as a lineage-exclusive marker or as proof of a master-driver state.
IL4.located_support_summary: Across human CD4 systems and donors, IL4 and IL13 were highly coexpressed and each was detected in roughly 70-80% of the operationally defined Th2 response.

IL5.source_title: Hierarchical IL-5 expression defines a subpopulation of highly differentiated human Th2 cells.
IL5.exact_locator: Full text, Results section 'IL-5 expression is restricted to a minority subpopulation of IL-4+, IL-5+, IL-13+ Th2 cells'; Figure 1A and 1C-G; Discussion opening paragraph.
IL5.species_lineage_scope: Ex vivo and stimulated human CD4 T cells, allergen-specific responses, and short-term human Th2 lines from healthy and allergic donors
IL5.claim_scope_limit: Supports a differentiated Th2 effector substate. IL5 is expressed by only a minority of Th2 cells in this study and is also produced by non-T-cell type-2 effectors.
IL5.bounded_rationale: IL5 is a human Th2 effector cytokine enriched in a minority, more highly differentiated Th2 subpopulation; it is not a universal Th2 marker.
IL5.located_support_summary: IL5 was confined to about 17-23% of Th2 cells in the main donor groups, while IL5-positive cells usually coexpressed IL4 and IL13 and showed features of greater differentiation.

IL13.source_title: Hierarchical IL-5 expression defines a subpopulation of highly differentiated human Th2 cells.
IL13.exact_locator: Full text, Results section 'IL-5 expression is restricted to a minority subpopulation of IL-4+, IL-5+, IL-13+ Th2 cells'; Figure 1A-I, especially 1B and 1D-G.
IL13.species_lineage_scope: Ex vivo and stimulated human CD4 T cells, allergen-specific responses, and short-term human Th2 lines from healthy and allergic donors
IL13.claim_scope_limit: Supports expression in human Th2 responses. IL13 is shared with ILC2 and other type-2 states and therefore does not establish CD4 or Th2 identity alone.
IL13.bounded_rationale: IL13 is a human Th2-associated effector cytokine frequently coexpressed with IL4; use it as a type-2 cytokine-program component, not a lineage-exclusive marker.
IL13.located_support_summary: IL13 and IL4 were each detected in roughly 70-80% of the operationally defined Th2 response and were commonly coexpressed in human donor and allergen-specific systems.

sampling.rule: 50 lowest hashes per occupied marker bin, no replacement

bins_sha256_superseded.note: Historical mean-display hash from the Phase-1 build; the original per-gene bin assignments were never persisted and cannot be reconstructed. Frozen bins are now the committed stage01_bins_v3.csv (method_version stage1-continuous-v3.0.1). Equivalence to the original proven on occupied marker bins: marker_bins + candidate_counts match the checkpoint and all 2,100 controls reconstruct byte-for-byte. Scores/coefficients byte-unchanged.

selection_rationale.IL23R: IL23R is a human memory-Th17-associated receptor that marks IL-23 responsiveness and supports Th17 effector signaling; it should not be described as required for the initial differentiation step or as Th17-exclusive.
selection_rationale.KLRB1: KLRB1/CD161 is a human Th17-associated surface marker and precursor feature, but it has low specificity and should not be treated as sufficient for Th17 identity.

CCR6.source_title: Surface phenotype and antigenic specificity of human interleukin 17-producing T helper memory cells.
CCR6.exact_locator: Acosta-Rodriguez 2007 abstract: 'expression of CCR6 and CCR4 together identified human memory' Th17
CCR6.claim_scope_limit: shared with Treg/Tfh/some memory and B cells
CCR6.bounded_rationale: CCR6 is a primary-supported human Th17-associated surface marker; not Th17-exclusive.

RORC.source_title: The orphan nuclear receptor RORgammat directs the differentiation program of proinflammatory IL-17+ T helper cells.
RORC.exact_locator: Ivanov 2006 abstract: 'orphan nuclear receptor RORgammat is the key transcription factor' (MOUSE)
RORC.claim_scope_limit: shared with ILC3/MAIT/Tc17/γδT; human application is extension of mouse finding
RORC.bounded_rationale: RORC/RORγt is the primary-supported Th17 master TF (mouse); human use relies on cross-species extension.

IL17A.source_title: Surface phenotype and antigenic specificity of human interleukin 17-producing T helper memory cells.
IL17A.claim_scope_limit: among T cells fairly Th17-restricted; also γδ/MAIT/Tc17
IL17A.bounded_rationale: IL17A is a primary-supported signature Th17 cytokine.

IL17F.source_title: The orphan nuclear receptor RORgammat directs the differentiation program of proinflammatory IL-17+ T helper cells.
IL17F.exact_locator: Ivanov 2006 abstract: 'genes encoding IL-17 and the related cytokine IL-17F in naive CD4+ T helper cells' (MOUSE)
IL17F.claim_scope_limit: also gd T/ILC3; defensible among conventional Th subsets but not lineage-exclusive
IL17F.bounded_rationale: IL17F is a primary-supported Th17 effector cytokine.

IL23R.source_title: The IL23R R381Q gene variant protects against immune-mediated diseases by impairing IL-23-induced Th17 effector response in humans.
IL23R.exact_locator: Full text, Results section 'Study of circulating Th17 cells in IL23R R381Q gene variant carriers', Figure 1A; Results on IL-23-induced effector response, Figure 6A-D; Discussion paragraph beginning 'A key finding'.
IL23R.species_lineage_scope: Freshly isolated human memory CD3+CD4+CD45RO+ T cells and in-vitro-polarized human Th17 cells from genotyped healthy donors
IL23R.claim_scope_limit: Directly supports IL23R-plus-CCR6 phenotyping and IL-23-dependent IL17A/STAT3 effector signaling. The source explicitly separates effector response from initial Th17 differentiation.
IL23R.bounded_rationale: IL23R is a human memory-Th17-associated receptor that marks IL-23 responsiveness and supports Th17 effector signaling; it should not be described as required for the initial differentiation step or as Th17-exclusive.
IL23R.located_support_summary: The study defined circulating human Th17 cells as IL-23R+CCR6+ within memory helper T cells and showed that the protective IL23R variant reduced IL-23-induced IL17A production and STAT3 phosphorylation without materially changing Th17 differentiation.

KLRB1.source_title: Human interleukin 17-producing cells originate from a CD161+CD4+ T cell precursor.
KLRB1.exact_locator: Full text, Results section 'Human Th17, but neither Th1 nor Th2, clones express CD161 on their surface', Figure 1A-C; next Results section, Figure 2A-B; Abstract for precursor scope.
KLRB1.species_lineage_scope: Human circulating CD4 T-cell clones, ex vivo adult blood CD4 T cells, umbilical-cord and thymic CD4 precursors, and inflamed human tissues
KLRB1.claim_scope_limit: Directly supports enrichment in human Th17 clones and containment of IL17-producing cells in the CD161-positive fraction in the studied systems. CD161 is broadly present on NK, NKT, MAIT, CD8, and other CD4 populations.
KLRB1.bounded_rationale: KLRB1/CD161 is a human Th17-associated surface marker and precursor feature, but it has low specificity and should not be treated as sufficient for Th17 identity.
KLRB1.located_support_summary: CD161/KLRB1 was strongly enriched in human Th17 clones relative to Th1 and Th2 clones; IL17-producing circulating CD4 cells were found in the CD161-positive fraction, with RORC and IL23R enriched in CD161+CCR6+ cells.

sampling.rule: 50 lowest hashes per occupied marker bin, no replacement

selection_rationale.CXCR5: CXCR5 is a human follicular-homing and B-cell-helper-associated receptor used to mark a Tfh-like program; it is not Tfh- or CD4-specific in mixed-cell data because B cells also express CXCR5.
selection_rationale.BCL6: BCL6 is a central human Tfh-program transcriptional regulator that is enriched in CXCR5-positive tonsillar Tfh cells and can induce major Tfh migration and T:B-interaction modules; it is not T-cell-specific because germinal-center B cells also express BCL6.
selection_rationale.IL21: IL21 is a prominent human Tfh/GC-Tfh helper cytokine and supports a Tfh-like effector program, but it is shared with other CD4 and innate-like lymphocyte states and is not sufficient for Tfh identity.

CXCR5.source_title: CXC chemokine receptor 5 expression defines follicular homing T cells with B cell helper function.
CXCR5.exact_locator: Full text, Results sections 'CXCR5+ T Cells in Blood and Tonsils' and 'B Cell Helper Function of CXCR5+ T Cells'; Table I and Figure 3B; follicular localization in Figures 4-5.
CXCR5.species_lineage_scope: Human tonsillar and peripheral-blood memory T cells, including CD4-enriched CXCR5-positive populations and tonsillar T-cell/B-cell cocultures
CXCR5.claim_scope_limit: Directly supports follicular localization, chemotaxis, and B-cell helper function of human CXCR5-positive T cells. It does not make CXCR5 sufficient for Tfh identity.
CXCR5.bounded_rationale: CXCR5 is a human follicular-homing and B-cell-helper-associated receptor used to mark a Tfh-like program; it is not Tfh- or CD4-specific in mixed-cell data because B cells also express CXCR5.
CXCR5.located_support_summary: More than 90% of human CXCR5-positive blood T cells were CD4 memory cells; tonsillar CXCR5-positive T cells localized to follicles and induced substantially more IgG and IgA than CXCR5-negative T cells in B-cell coculture.

BCL6.source_title: Bcl6 and Maf cooperate to instruct human follicular helper CD4 T cell differentiation.
BCL6.exact_locator: Full text, Results section 'Bcl6 protein is expressed by human Tfh and GC Tfh', Figure 1A-C; section 'Bcl6 instructs the conversion of Tfh to GC Tfh', Figure 2C-D and 2K; Figure 3 for conversion of CXCR5-negative CD4 cells.
BCL6.species_lineage_scope: Primary human tonsillar CD4 Tfh and GC-Tfh subsets, with BCL6 transduction of sorted human CD4 T cells
BCL6.claim_scope_limit: Directly supports enrichment and causal induction of a Tfh-like program in human CD4 T cells. It does not support BCL6 as a CD4- or cell-type-exclusive readout.
BCL6.bounded_rationale: BCL6 is a central human Tfh-program transcriptional regulator that is enriched in CXCR5-positive tonsillar Tfh cells and can induce major Tfh migration and T:B-interaction modules; it is not T-cell-specific because germinal-center B cells also express BCL6.
BCL6.located_support_summary: CXCR5-high and CXCR5-intermediate human tonsillar CD4 subsets expressed more BCL6 protein than CXCR5-negative cells; experimental BCL6 expression increased CXCR5 and other migration and T:B-interaction genes in primary human CD4 cells.

IL21.source_title: Bcl6 and Maf cooperate to instruct human follicular helper CD4 T cell differentiation.
IL21.exact_locator: Full text, Results section 'Bcl6 protein is expressed by human Tfh and GC Tfh', Figure 1D (IL21-dependent IgM help); section 'Helper cytokines IL-4 and IL-21', Figure 5; section 'Maf induces IL-21 secretion', Figure 7B-C.
IL21.species_lineage_scope: Primary human tonsillar CXCR5-intermediate Tfh and CXCR5-high GC-Tfh CD4 subsets, B-cell coculture, and human CD4 transduction experiments
IL21.claim_scope_limit: Directly supports production by human tonsillar Tfh populations and IL21-dependent B-cell help. The same article shows that BCL6 alone is not sufficient to induce IL21 and that Maf can enhance it.
IL21.bounded_rationale: IL21 is a prominent human Tfh/GC-Tfh helper cytokine and supports a Tfh-like effector program, but it is shared with other CD4 and innate-like lymphocyte states and is not sufficient for Tfh identity.
IL21.located_support_summary: Human CXCR5-positive tonsillar Tfh subsets provided largely IL21-dependent B-cell help; GC-Tfh cells produced IL21, frequently with IL4, and Maf transduction increased IL21 production in primary human CD4 cells.

sampling.rule: 50 lowest hashes per occupied marker bin, no replacement

bins_sha256_superseded.note: Historical mean-display hash from the Phase-1 build; the original per-gene bin assignments were never persisted and cannot be reconstructed. Frozen bins are now the committed stage01_bins_v3.csv (method_version stage1-continuous-v3.0.1). Equivalence to the original proven on occupied marker bins: marker_bins + candidate_counts match the checkpoint and all 2,100 controls reconstruct byte-for-byte. Scores/coefficients byte-unchanged.

selection_rationale.IKZF2: IKZF2/Helios is enriched in activated human Tregs but is also induced by T-cell activation and proliferation; do not call it a Treg-stability marker or a reliable thymic-origin discriminator.
selection_rationale.CTLA4: CTLA4 is enriched intracellularly and persists after activation in suppressive human CD4+CD25+ regulatory cells; treat it as a Treg-associated checkpoint with substantial activation overlap, not as a Treg-specific identity marker or a proven sole effector mechanism.
selection_rationale.CCR8: CCR8 marks an activated tissue/tumor-resident human Treg state and is enriched over conventional CD4 T cells in multiple tumors; it is context-dependent and should not be treated as a universal peripheral-Treg marker.
selection_rationale.TNFRSF18: TNFRSF18/GITR is associated with suppressive human CD25+CD4+ T-cell clones, but it is also activation-induced on conventional effector T cells; use it as a Treg-associated costimulatory-receptor component, not a Treg-specific marker or proof of suppressive necessity.

FOXP3.source_title: Control of regulatory T cell development by the transcription factor Foxp3.
FOXP3.exact_locator: Hori 2003 abstract: 'Foxp3 encodes a transcription factor... specifically expressed in CD4+ regulatory T cells' (MOUSE)
FOXP3.claim_scope_limit: transiently induced in ACTIVATED human conventional CD4 T cells — not Treg-exclusive
FOXP3.bounded_rationale: FOXP3 is the primary-supported Treg master TF (mouse); in activated human CD4 high-FOXP3 is not a Treg-specific call.

human_corroboration.exact_locator: Wang et al. 2007 (Eur J Immunol 37:129-138): activation induces transient FOXP3 in human conventional CD4 T cells without regulatory function
human_corroboration.claim_scope_limit: Wang et al. 2007 (PMID 17154262): human — activated conventional CD4 T cells transiently induce FOXP3; not Treg-exclusive

IKZF2.source_title: Helios expression is a marker of T cell activation and proliferation.
IKZF2.exact_locator: Abstract; Results Figure 1B (human Treg-associated markers), Figure 3E-F and Figure 4 (activation/division in human responders), Figure 6B (CD3/CD28 plus or minus IL2), and Discussion conclusion.
IKZF2.species_lineage_scope: Human PBMC CD4 T cells, human CD4+FOXP3+ Tregs, human CD4 and CD8 responder cells, plus parallel murine experiments
IKZF2.claim_scope_limit: This human primary study directly undercuts stability and origin-specific wording. Helios can remain a bounded, activation-overlapping Treg-associated module component, not a lineage-stability claim.
IKZF2.bounded_rationale: IKZF2/Helios is enriched in activated human Tregs but is also induced by T-cell activation and proliferation; do not call it a Treg-stability marker or a reliable thymic-origin discriminator.
IKZF2.located_support_summary: Helios was enriched with human Treg-associated markers but was induced in activated and dividing human CD4 and CD8 cells and declined after resting; the authors concluded it was unsuitable for distinguishing natural from induced Tregs.

CTLA4.source_title: Identification and functional characterization of human CD4(+)CD25(+) T cells with regulatory properties isolated from peripheral blood.
CTLA4.exact_locator: Full text, Results paragraph immediately before Figure 2 and Figure 2A-B; suppression and blocking experiments in Figures 4 and 6; Discussion paragraph on CTLA4.
CTLA4.species_lineage_scope: Freshly isolated and activated human peripheral-blood CD4+CD25+ cells with measured anergy and contact-dependent suppressive activity
CTLA4.claim_scope_limit: Directly supports expression in a functionally regulatory human population. In this study, CTLA4 blockade did not reverse suppression, so the source should not be stretched to prove that CTLA4 alone mediates suppressive function.
CTLA4.bounded_rationale: CTLA4 is enriched intracellularly and persists after activation in suppressive human CD4+CD25+ regulatory cells; treat it as a Treg-associated checkpoint with substantial activation overlap, not as a Treg-specific identity marker or a proven sole effector mechanism.
CTLA4.located_support_summary: A CD45RO-positive subset of freshly isolated human CD4+CD25+ cells contained intracellular CTLA4 and displayed prolonged surface CTLA4 after activation while showing anergy and suppression. Blocking results did not establish CTLA4 as the operative suppressive mechanism.

CCR8.source_title: Regulatory T Cells Exhibit Distinct Features in Human Breast Cancer.
CCR8.exact_locator: Full text, Results sections 'CCR8 is Expressed by Intratumoral Treg Cells' and preceding CCR8 differential-expression paragraph; Figure 6A-D (cell-type and tumor comparisons), Figure 6E (CCL1 chemotaxis), and Figure 7B-E (activation/proliferation context).
CCR8.species_lineage_scope: FOXP3+ Tregs and conventional CD4 T cells from treatment-naive human breast tumors, normal breast tissue, blood, and several additional solid tumors
CCR8.claim_scope_limit: Directly supports a tissue/tumor Treg association, functional CCL1 chemotaxis, and activation context. The article also identifies NKT expression and much lower peripheral-blood Treg expression.
CCR8.bounded_rationale: CCR8 marks an activated tissue/tumor-resident human Treg state and is enriched over conventional CD4 T cells in multiple tumors; it is context-dependent and should not be treated as a universal peripheral-Treg marker.
CCR8.located_support_summary: CCR8 was strongly enriched on human tumor-resident FOXP3+ Tregs relative to Tconv cells across breast and other solid tumors, supported by more than 70 breast-cancer samples; CCR8-positive tumor Tregs migrated toward CCL1.

TNFRSF18.source_title: Human CD25+CD4+ T suppressor cell clones produce transforming growth factor beta, but not interleukin 10, and are distinct from type 1 T regulatory cells.
TNFRSF18.exact_locator: Full text, Results section 'Expression of CTLA-4 and GITR on CD25+CD4+ T Cell Clones', Figure 6 and the following functional paragraph; Discussion paragraph beginning 'Suppressive and nonsuppressive clones'.
TNFRSF18.species_lineage_scope: Cloned human peripheral-blood CD25+CD4+ T cells functionally classified as suppressive or nonsuppressive
TNFRSF18.claim_scope_limit: Directly supports higher expression and correlation with suppressive capacity. The same source found no reversal with anti-GITR or recombinant ligand and explicitly states that GITR is not specific because activated effector CD4 cells express it.
TNFRSF18.bounded_rationale: TNFRSF18/GITR is associated with suppressive human CD25+CD4+ T-cell clones, but it is also activation-induced on conventional effector T cells; use it as a Treg-associated costimulatory-receptor component, not a Treg-specific marker or proof of suppressive necessity.
TNFRSF18.located_support_summary: Suppressive human CD25+CD4+ clones expressed four- to sixfold more GITR than nonsuppressive clones, with a significant expression-function correlation; perturbation did not establish a causal suppressive role, and activated effector expression limits specificity.

sampling.rule: 50 lowest hashes per occupied marker bin, no replacement

selection_rationale.KLRD1: KLRD1 RNA is associated with a primary human hCMV-reactive cytotoxic T-cell pre-effector program that contains both CD4 and CD8 cells; it is not a CD4-CTL-specific identity marker.

citations: Patil et al., Sci Immunol 2018 3:eaan8664 (human CD4-CTL; GZMH)

GNLY.source_title: Precursors of human CD4+ cytotoxic T lymphocytes identified by single-cell transcriptome analysis.
GNLY.exact_locator: Patil 2018 PMC5931334 (official PMC full-text XML, auditor-fetched): cytotoxic-transcript list 'GZMB, PRF1, GZMH, GNLY, ... S1PR5, NKG7, CD244' in the CD4-TEMRA differential-expression RESULTS (GZMB/PRF1 9 hits, GZMH/GNLY 5, NKG7 6). https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC5931334/
GNLY.claim_scope_limit: shared with CD8/NK cytotoxic programs; a pan-cytotoxicity signature (GZMH most CD4-CTL-associated)
GNLY.bounded_rationale: GNLY is a primary-supported (Patil 2018) cytotoxicity transcript of the human CD4-CTL program; not CD4-CTL-specific vs CD8/NK.

PRF1.source_title: Precursors of human CD4+ cytotoxic T lymphocytes identified by single-cell transcriptome analysis.
PRF1.exact_locator: Patil 2018 PMC5931334 (official PMC full-text XML, auditor-fetched): cytotoxic-transcript list 'GZMB, PRF1, GZMH, GNLY, ... S1PR5, NKG7, CD244' in the CD4-TEMRA differential-expression RESULTS (GZMB/PRF1 9 hits, GZMH/GNLY 5, NKG7 6). https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC5931334/
PRF1.claim_scope_limit: shared with CD8/NK cytotoxic programs; a pan-cytotoxicity signature (GZMH most CD4-CTL-associated)
PRF1.bounded_rationale: PRF1 is a primary-supported (Patil 2018) cytotoxicity transcript of the human CD4-CTL program; not CD4-CTL-specific vs CD8/NK.

GZMH.source_title: Precursors of human CD4+ cytotoxic T lymphocytes identified by single-cell transcriptome analysis.
GZMH.exact_locator: Patil 2018 PMC5931334 (official PMC full-text XML, auditor-fetched): cytotoxic-transcript list 'GZMB, PRF1, GZMH, GNLY, ... S1PR5, NKG7, CD244' in the CD4-TEMRA differential-expression RESULTS (GZMB/PRF1 9 hits, GZMH/GNLY 5, NKG7 6). https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC5931334/
GZMH.claim_scope_limit: shared with CD8/NK cytotoxic programs; a pan-cytotoxicity signature (GZMH most CD4-CTL-associated)
GZMH.bounded_rationale: GZMH is a primary-supported (Patil 2018) cytotoxicity transcript of the human CD4-CTL program; not CD4-CTL-specific vs CD8/NK.

KLRD1.source_title: Single-cell transcriptomic and T cell antigen receptor analysis of human cytomegalovirus (hCMV)-specific memory T cells reveals effectors and pre-effectors of CD8(+)- and CD4(+)-cytotoxic T cells.
KLRD1.exact_locator: Results section 'hCMV-reactive CD4-CTLs and CD8-CTLs show similar transcriptomic profile': paragraphs P30-P32; Fig. 5d plots KLRD1 RNA along the CTL trajectory; paragraph P31 identifies higher KLRD1 in CTL pre-effector cluster 4; Fig. 5g and paragraph P32 establish comparable CD4/CD8 representation and broadly shared within-cluster transcriptomes.
KLRD1.claim_scope_limit: Mixed CD4/CD8 CTL cluster; supports shared cytotoxic T-cell RNA association, not CD4 specificity, identity, or receptor function.
KLRD1.bounded_rationale: KLRD1 RNA is associated with a primary human hCMV-reactive cytotoxic T-cell pre-effector program that contains both CD4 and CD8 cells; it is not a CD4-CTL-specific identity marker.

GZMB.source_title: Precursors of human CD4+ cytotoxic T lymphocytes identified by single-cell transcriptome analysis.
GZMB.exact_locator: Patil 2018 PMC5931334 (official PMC full-text XML, auditor-fetched): cytotoxic-transcript list 'GZMB, PRF1, GZMH, GNLY, ... S1PR5, NKG7, CD244' in the CD4-TEMRA differential-expression RESULTS (GZMB/PRF1 9 hits, GZMH/GNLY 5, NKG7 6). https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC5931334/
GZMB.claim_scope_limit: shared with CD8/NK cytotoxic programs; a pan-cytotoxicity signature (GZMH most CD4-CTL-associated)
GZMB.bounded_rationale: GZMB is a primary-supported (Patil 2018) cytotoxicity transcript of the human CD4-CTL program; not CD4-CTL-specific vs CD8/NK.

NKG7.source_title: Precursors of human CD4+ cytotoxic T lymphocytes identified by single-cell transcriptome analysis.
NKG7.exact_locator: Patil 2018 PMC5931334 (official PMC full-text XML, auditor-fetched): cytotoxic-transcript list 'GZMB, PRF1, GZMH, GNLY, ... S1PR5, NKG7, CD244' in the CD4-TEMRA differential-expression RESULTS (GZMB/PRF1 9 hits, GZMH/GNLY 5, NKG7 6). https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC5931334/
NKG7.claim_scope_limit: shared with CD8/NK cytotoxic programs; a pan-cytotoxicity signature (GZMH most CD4-CTL-associated)
NKG7.bounded_rationale: NKG7 is a primary-supported (Patil 2018) cytotoxicity transcript of the human CD4-CTL program; not CD4-CTL-specific vs CD8/NK.

sampling.rule: 50 lowest hashes per occupied marker bin, no replacement

bins_sha256_superseded.note: Historical mean-display hash from the Phase-1 build; the original per-gene bin assignments were never persisted and cannot be reconstructed. Frozen bins are now the committed stage01_bins_v3.csv (method_version stage1-continuous-v3.0.1). Equivalence to the original proven on occupied marker bins: marker_bins + candidate_counts match the checkpoint and all 2,100 controls reconstruct byte-for-byte. Scores/coefficients byte-unchanged.

IL9.source_title: The transcription factor PU.1 is required for the development of IL-9-producing T cells and allergic inflammation.
IL9.exact_locator: Chang 2010 abstract: 'interleukin 9 (IL-9)-secreting subset of helper T cells' (mouse + human siRNA)
IL9.claim_scope_limit: shared with mast cells/ILC2; two-gene panel is thin
IL9.bounded_rationale: IL9 is the primary-supported signature Th9 cytokine (mouse + human siRNA evidence in Chang 2010).

SPI1.source_title: The transcription factor PU.1 is required for the development of IL-9-producing T cells and allergic inflammation.
SPI1.exact_locator: Chang 2010 abstract: 'ETS-family transcription factor PU.1 was required' (siRNA in human T cells in text)
SPI1.claim_scope_limit: PU.1 is a master myeloid/B-cell TF; in a CD4 object high-SPI1 risks scoring myeloid/B contamination
SPI1.bounded_rationale: SPI1/PU.1 as Th9-promoting TF is primary-supported (Chang 2010); specificity limit: broadly myeloid/B TF, contamination risk in mixed objects.

sampling.rule: 50 lowest hashes per occupied marker bin, no replacement

bins_sha256_superseded.note: Historical mean-display hash from the Phase-1 build; the original per-gene bin assignments were never persisted and cannot be reconstructed. Frozen bins are now the committed stage01_bins_v3.csv (method_version stage1-continuous-v3.0.1). Equivalence to the original proven on occupied marker bins: marker_bins + candidate_counts match the checkpoint and all 2,100 controls reconstruct byte-for-byte. Scores/coefficients byte-unchanged.

selection_rationale.TCF7: TCF7 RNA supports a resting human CD4 naive/central-memory axis; it should not be read as naive-specific identity or as proof of stemness.
selection_rationale.LEF1: LEF1 RNA supports a resting human CD4 naive/central-memory axis; it should not be read as naive-specific identity or as proof of stemness.
selection_rationale.MAL: MAL RNA is associated with a resting human CD4 state and is enriched on naive relative to effector-memory cells, while overlap with central memory prevents a naive-specific interpretation.

citations: Gattinoni et al., Nat Med 2011 (TCF7/LEF1 stemness)

CCR7.source_title: Two subsets of memory T lymphocytes with distinct homing potentials and effector functions.
CCR7.exact_locator: Sallusto 1999 abstract: 'expression of CCR7... divides human memory T cells'
CCR7.claim_scope_limit: shared with central-memory (Tcm); marks naive/Tcm axis, not naive-exclusive
CCR7.bounded_rationale: CCR7 is primary-supported (Sallusto 1999); it defines a naive/central-memory homing axis, cannot discriminate naive from Tcm.

SELL.source_title: A human memory T cell subset with stem cell-like properties.
SELL.claim_scope_limit: shared with Tcm; CD8-centric primary source
SELL.bounded_rationale: SELL/CD62L appears verbatim in Gattinoni's naive-like phenotype (CD8-centric); supports naive/Tcm state.

TCF7.source_title: Single-cell transcriptomics of human T cells reveals tissue and activation signatures in health and disease
TCF7.exact_locator: Results 'scRNA-seq analysis of human T cells in blood and tissues' states that resting CD4 T cells express CCR7, SELL and TCF7 and correspond to naive or TCM; Fig. 1c maps donor 1 cluster 1 and donor 2 cluster 1 to CD4 rest; Supplementary Data 3 worksheet cluster1 row 16 (FDR 0; log2_effect 1.2172) and Supplementary Data 4 worksheet cluster1 row 14 (FDR 0; log2_effect 1.2222).
TCF7.claim_scope_limit: Resting CD4 cluster was interpreted by the authors as naive or TCM; does not distinguish naive from central memory or establish stemness function.
TCF7.bounded_rationale: TCF7 RNA supports a resting human CD4 naive/central-memory axis; it should not be read as naive-specific identity or as proof of stemness.

LEF1.source_title: Single-cell transcriptomics of human T cells reveals tissue and activation signatures in health and disease
LEF1.exact_locator: Fig. 1c maps donor 1 cluster 1 and donor 2 cluster 1 to CD4 rest; Supplementary Data 3 worksheet cluster1 row 29 (FDR 3.09e-301; log2_effect 1.2480) and Supplementary Data 4 worksheet cluster1 row 51 (FDR 1.20e-189; log2_effect 1.0359).
LEF1.claim_scope_limit: Resting CD4 cluster was interpreted as naive or TCM; direct RNA enrichment does not establish naive specificity or transcription-factor function.
LEF1.bounded_rationale: LEF1 RNA supports a resting human CD4 naive/central-memory axis; it should not be read as naive-specific identity or as proof of stemness.

IL7R.source_title: A human memory T cell subset with stem cell-like properties.
IL7R.claim_scope_limit: broadly on naive AND memory, low on effector/Treg — NOT naive-specific
IL7R.bounded_rationale: IL7R/CD127 appears in Gattinoni's naive-like phenotype; marks homeostatic naive+memory, not naive-specific.

MAL.source_title: Single-cell transcriptomics of human T cells reveals tissue and activation signatures in health and disease
MAL.exact_locator: Fig. 1c maps donor 1 cluster 1 to CD4 rest and donor 2 cluster 2 to CD4 rest 2; Supplementary Data 3 worksheet cluster1 row 809 (FDR 2.16e-9; log2_effect 0.2056) and Supplementary Data 4 worksheet cluster2 row 3 (FDR 0; log2_effect 1.5821).
MAL.claim_scope_limit: RNA enrichment is in resting CD4 clusters; orthogonal protein study shows naive and central-memory expression, so MAL is not naive-exclusive.
MAL.bounded_rationale: MAL RNA is associated with a resting human CD4 state and is enriched on naive relative to effector-memory cells, while overlap with central memory prevents a naive-specific interpretation.

corroborating_source.source_title: Differentiation and activation of human CD4 T cells is associated with a gradual loss of myelin and lymphocyte protein
corroborating_source.exact_locator: Results 'MAL is preferentially expressed on naive and central memory CD4 T cells,' Fig. 6A-B (nine human donors); Discussion states naive CD4 cells were uniformly MAL-positive while most CCR7+ CM cells were also positive.

sampling.rule: 50 lowest hashes per occupied marker bin, no replacement

bins_sha256_superseded.note: Historical mean-display hash from the Phase-1 build; the original per-gene bin assignments were never persisted and cannot be reconstructed. Frozen bins are now the committed stage01_bins_v3.csv (method_version stage1-continuous-v3.0.1). Equivalence to the original proven on occupied marker bins: marker_bins + candidate_counts match the checkpoint and all 2,100 controls reconstruct byte-for-byte. Scores/coefficients byte-unchanged.

selection_rationale.CD69: CD69 RNA is enriched in primary human activated CD4 T-cell clusters; it supports an activation-associated RNA component, not a distinct cell identity.
selection_rationale.IL2RA: IL2RA RNA is enriched in primary human activated CD4 T-cell clusters; it supports an activation-associated RNA component but overlaps Treg expression.
selection_rationale.CD38: CD38 has primary human support as an activation-associated T-cell marker and has been used in a human single-cell RNA activation score; within this panel it should be read only as activation-associated RNA, not as identity or mechanism.
selection_rationale.MKI67: MKI67 RNA supports the proliferating/cycling arm of a stimulated human T-cell program; it should not be interpreted as activation-specific or as a cell identity marker.
selection_rationale.TNFRSF9: TNFRSF9 RNA is enriched in primary human activated CD4 T-cell clusters; it supports an activation-associated RNA component, not a distinct identity.

citations: Shipkova & Wieland, Clin Chim Acta 2012 (CD69/CD25/HLA-DR activation)

CD69.source_title: Single-cell transcriptomics of human T cells reveals tissue and activation signatures in health and disease
CD69.exact_locator: Fig. 1a defines anti-CD3/anti-CD28 activation and Fig. 1c maps donor 1 cluster 4 to CD4 act 3 and donor 2 cluster 4 to CD4 act 2; Supplementary Data 3 worksheet cluster4 row 21 (FDR 9.67e-90; log2_effect 1.0865) and Supplementary Data 4 worksheet cluster4 row 61 (FDR 2.89e-295; log2_effect 1.1900).
CD69.claim_scope_limit: Activation-cluster RNA association; CD69 also occurs in resident and other activated states, so it is not an identity marker.
CD69.bounded_rationale: CD69 RNA is enriched in primary human activated CD4 T-cell clusters; it supports an activation-associated RNA component, not a distinct cell identity.

IL2RA.source_title: Single-cell transcriptomics of human T cells reveals tissue and activation signatures in health and disease
IL2RA.exact_locator: Fig. 1a defines anti-CD3/anti-CD28 activation and Fig. 1c maps donor 1 cluster 4 to CD4 act 3 and donor 2 cluster 4 to CD4 act 2; Supplementary Data 3 worksheet cluster4 row 51 (FDR 5.02e-54; log2_effect 1.1884) and Supplementary Data 4 worksheet cluster4 row 23 (FDR 0; log2_effect 1.8643).
IL2RA.claim_scope_limit: Activation-cluster RNA association; IL2RA is also constitutive/high in Treg states and therefore is not activation-specific.
IL2RA.bounded_rationale: IL2RA RNA is enriched in primary human activated CD4 T-cell clusters; it supports an activation-associated RNA component but overlaps Treg expression.

CD38.source_title: Single-Cell Transcriptomic Profiling of MAIT Cells in Patients With COVID-19
CD38.exact_locator: Methods 'Defining Cell State Scores' explicitly includes CD38 among nine activation-related genes in a single-cell RNA activation score; Results 'Features of MAIT Cells' and Fig. 3A apply that score; Discussion explicitly distinguishes this RNA-level scoring system from protein-level activation markers.
CD38.claim_scope_limit: The RNA source operationalizes CD38 inside an activation score rather than independently selecting it; the orthogonal experiment is protein-level. This is bounded module support, not RNA-specific mechanistic validation.
CD38.bounded_rationale: CD38 has primary human support as an activation-associated T-cell marker and has been used in a human single-cell RNA activation score; within this panel it should be read only as activation-associated RNA, not as identity or mechanism.

corroborating_source.source_title: Toll-like receptor ligands induce human T cell activation and death, a model for HIV pathogenesis
corroborating_source.exact_locator: Results 'TLR ligands can induce early activation marker expression,' Fig. 1 (CD4 and CD8 human T cells); Fig. 4B shows induction on purified memory CD4 T cells after overnight poly I:C or anti-CD3 exposure.

MKI67.source_title: Genome-wide CRISPR Screens in Primary Human T Cells Reveal Key Regulators of Immune Function
MKI67.exact_locator: Results 'SLICE Paired with Single Cell RNA-Seq': paragraph P19 states stimulated human T cells induced cell-cycle genes including MKI67; Fig. 4B and caption P81 show MKI67 RNA on the resting/re-stimulated single-cell map; paragraph P21 places MKI67 in activation/cell-cycle clusters 10-12.
MKI67.claim_scope_limit: MKI67 tracks the cycling/proliferative arm after stimulation and is not activation-specific; any cycling cell can express it.
MKI67.bounded_rationale: MKI67 RNA supports the proliferating/cycling arm of a stimulated human T-cell program; it should not be interpreted as activation-specific or as a cell identity marker.

TNFRSF9.source_title: Single-cell transcriptomics of human T cells reveals tissue and activation signatures in health and disease
TNFRSF9.exact_locator: Fig. 1c maps donor 2 clusters 4 and 5 to CD4 act 2 and CD4 act 3; Supplementary Data 4 worksheet cluster4 row 1664 (FDR 6.65e-42; log2_effect 1.1746) and worksheet cluster5 row 53 (FDR 3.05e-145; log2_effect 2.1461).
TNFRSF9.claim_scope_limit: Activation-cluster RNA association; TNFRSF9 also occurs in activated Treg and chronically stimulated states.
TNFRSF9.bounded_rationale: TNFRSF9 RNA is enriched in primary human activated CD4 T-cell clusters; it supports an activation-associated RNA component, not a distinct identity.

HLA-DRA.exact_locator: INTENDED_ONLY: present in panel_genes_intended, absent from panel_genes_measured; contributes zero to the score.
HLA-DRA.claim_scope_limit: Intended-only; not measured in the object; carries no measured-marker primary locator and is outside the measured-provenance denominator.
HLA-DRA.bounded_rationale: HLA-DRA is an intended late-activation (MHC-II) marker that is ABSENT from panel_genes_measured and contributes zero to the score.

sampling.rule: 50 lowest hashes per occupied marker bin, no replacement

Frozen bins are now the committed stage01_bins_v3.csv (method_version stage1-continuous-v3.0.1). Equivalence to the original proven on occupied marker bins: marker_bins + candidate_counts match the checkpoint and all 2,100 controls reconstruct byte-for-byte. Scores/coefficients byte-unchanged.

selection_rationale.ITGAL: ITGAL RNA is associated with a human CD8 memory T-cell transcriptional profile and can support the adhesion-like portion of the module; it is not memory- or CD4-specific.
selection_rationale.FAS: FAS RNA is enriched in resting human CD8 effector-/tissue-resident-memory clusters; it supports a memory/activation-associated RNA component, not memory identity.
selection_rationale.CD58: CD58 RNA was enriched in one primary human resting CD8 effector-/tissue-resident-memory cluster and can support an adhesion-like RNA component; it is not a memory-specific marker.
selection_rationale.ITGA4: ITGA4 RNA is associated with a human CD8 memory T-cell transcriptional profile and can support the adhesion-like portion of the module; it is not memory- or CD4-specific.
selection_rationale.S100A4: S100A4 RNA was enriched in one primary human resting CD8 effector-/tissue-resident-memory cluster; it supports a memory-associated RNA component but not memory identity or function.
selection_rationale.CD27: CD27 RNA was enriched in one primary human activated CD8 effector-/tissue-resident-memory cluster; it supports a non-terminal memory-associated RNA component, not memory identity.

citations: Mahnke et al., Eur J Immunol 2013 (CD27/CD45RA)

ITGAL.source_title: Distinct transcriptomic and epigenomic modalities underpin human memory T cell subsets and their activation potential
ITGAL.exact_locator: Results 'The shared transcriptional programs of human CD4+ and CD8+ MTC,' paragraph Par7; Fig. 1e. Four-donor sorted human blood RNA-seq reports ITGAL/CD11a and ITGA4/VLA4 expressed more highly in CD8+ memory T cells.
ITGAL.claim_scope_limit: Authors report higher expression in CD8 memory T cells; this is lineage-biased and not memory-specific across all T cells.
ITGAL.bounded_rationale: ITGAL RNA is associated with a human CD8 memory T-cell transcriptional profile and can support the adhesion-like portion of the module; it is not memory- or CD4-specific.

FAS.source_title: Single-cell transcriptomics of human T cells reveals tissue and activation signatures in health and disease
FAS.exact_locator: Fig. 1c maps donor 1 cluster 8 and donor 2 cluster 7 to CD8 EM/TRM rest; Supplementary Data 3 worksheet cluster8 row 121 (FDR 2.06e-67; log2_effect 1.9725) and Supplementary Data 4 worksheet cluster7 row 28 (FDR 2.64e-40; log2_effect 1.3814).
FAS.claim_scope_limit: Enrichment is in resting CD8 EM/TRM clusters; FAS also marks activation/apoptosis and is not memory-specific.
FAS.bounded_rationale: FAS RNA is enriched in resting human CD8 effector-/tissue-resident-memory clusters; it supports a memory/activation-associated RNA component, not memory identity.

CD58.source_title: Single-cell transcriptomics of human T cells reveals tissue and activation signatures in health and disease
CD58.exact_locator: Fig. 1c maps donor 1 cluster 8 to CD8 EM/TRM rest; Supplementary Data 3 worksheet cluster8 row 1396 (FDR 5.60e-20; log2_effect 1.6110).
CD58.claim_scope_limit: One-donor resting CD8 EM/TRM enrichment only; CD58 is broadly expressed, so support is weak for memory specificity and limited to module association.
CD58.bounded_rationale: CD58 RNA was enriched in one primary human resting CD8 effector-/tissue-resident-memory cluster and can support an adhesion-like RNA component; it is not a memory-specific marker.

ITGA4.source_title: Distinct transcriptomic and epigenomic modalities underpin human memory T cell subsets and their activation potential
ITGA4.exact_locator: Results 'The shared transcriptional programs of human CD4+ and CD8+ MTC,' paragraph Par7; Fig. 1e. Four-donor sorted human blood RNA-seq reports ITGAL/CD11a and ITGA4/VLA4 expressed more highly in CD8+ memory T cells.
ITGA4.claim_scope_limit: Authors report higher expression in CD8 memory T cells; this is lineage-biased and not memory-specific across all T cells.
ITGA4.bounded_rationale: ITGA4 RNA is associated with a human CD8 memory T-cell transcriptional profile and can support the adhesion-like portion of the module; it is not memory- or CD4-specific.

S100A4.source_title: Single-cell transcriptomics of human T cells reveals tissue and activation signatures in health and disease
S100A4.exact_locator: Fig. 1c maps donor 1 cluster 8 to CD8 EM/TRM rest; Supplementary Data 3 worksheet cluster8 row 1229 (FDR 4.74e-22; log2_effect 0.4747).
S100A4.claim_scope_limit: One-donor resting CD8 EM/TRM enrichment; S100A4 is broadly expressed in activated, stromal, and myeloid contexts and is not memory-specific.
S100A4.bounded_rationale: S100A4 RNA was enriched in one primary human resting CD8 effector-/tissue-resident-memory cluster; it supports a memory-associated RNA component but not memory identity or function.

CD27.source_title: Single-cell transcriptomics of human T cells reveals tissue and activation signatures in health and disease
CD27.exact_locator: Fig. 1c maps donor 1 cluster 10 to CD8 EM/TRM act; Supplementary Data 3 worksheet cluster10 row 190 (FDR 0.00102; log2_effect 0.4732).
CD27.claim_scope_limit: Enrichment is in an activated CD8 EM/TRM cluster; CD27 also occurs in naive and non-terminal memory and is not a general memory-specific marker.
CD27.bounded_rationale: CD27 RNA was enriched in one primary human activated CD8 effector-/tissue-resident-memory cluster; it supports a non-terminal memory-associated RNA component, not memory identity.

sampling.rule: 50 lowest hashes per occupied marker bin, no replacement

Frozen bins are now the committed stage01_bins_v3.csv (method_version stage1-continuous-v3.0.1). Equivalence to the original proven on occupied marker bins: marker_bins + candidate_counts match the checkpoint and all 2,100 controls reconstruct byte-for-byte. Scores/coefficients byte-unchanged.

selection_rationale.PDCD1: PDCD1 RNA is part of a primary human CD4/CD8 tumor-reactive dysfunctional T-cell expression program; it supports a checkpoint-high RNA component but not exhaustion identity or function.
selection_rationale.TOX: TOX RNA is part of a primary human CD4/CD8 tumor-reactive dysfunctional T-cell expression program; it supports a checkpoint-high RNA association without claiming master-regulator function or cell identity.
selection_rationale.HAVCR2: HAVCR2 RNA is associated with a primary human CD8 tumor-reactive dysfunctional T-cell program; it supports a checkpoint-high RNA component but not CD4 transfer, exhaustion identity, or function.
selection_rationale.LAG3: LAG3 RNA is part of a primary human CD4/CD8 tumor-reactive dysfunctional T-cell expression program; it supports a checkpoint-high RNA component but not exhaustion identity or function.
selection_rationale.TIGIT: TIGIT RNA is part of a primary human CD4/CD8 tumor-reactive dysfunctional T-cell expression program; it supports a checkpoint-high RNA component but not exhaustion identity or function.
selection_rationale.ENTPD1: ENTPD1 RNA is part of a primary human CD4/CD8 tumor-reactive dysfunctional T-cell expression program; it supports a checkpoint-high RNA association without claiming exhaustion identity or ectoenzyme function.

citations: Wherry & Kurachi, Nat Rev Immunol 2015 15:486 (T-cell exhaustion review)

PDCD1.source_title: Molecular signatures of antitumor neoantigen-reactive T cells from metastatic human cancers
PDCD1.exact_locator: Results paragraph P14 beginning 'Restricting the gene expression analysis'; Fig. 2G-H and Table S8 show PDCD1 among genes shared by verified CD4+ and CD8+ NeoTCR-expressing TILs. Paragraph P16 explicitly evaluates PDCD1 within minimal activation/dysfunction RNA gene sets.
PDCD1.claim_scope_limit: Tumor/neoantigen-reactive dysfunctional TIL context; PDCD1 is also activation-induced and does not by itself establish exhaustion, tumor specificity, or function.
PDCD1.bounded_rationale: PDCD1 RNA is part of a primary human CD4/CD8 tumor-reactive dysfunctional T-cell expression program; it supports a checkpoint-high RNA component but not exhaustion identity or function.

TOX.source_title: Molecular signatures of antitumor neoantigen-reactive T cells from metastatic human cancers
TOX.exact_locator: Results paragraph P14 beginning 'Restricting the gene expression analysis'; Fig. 2G-H and Table S8 show TOX among genes shared by verified CD4+ and CD8+ NeoTCR-expressing TILs. Paragraph P16 explicitly evaluates TOX within minimal activation/dysfunction RNA gene sets.
TOX.claim_scope_limit: Human tumor TIL RNA association only; does not establish a universal master regulator, function, or CD4 identity.
TOX.bounded_rationale: TOX RNA is part of a primary human CD4/CD8 tumor-reactive dysfunctional T-cell expression program; it supports a checkpoint-high RNA association without claiming master-regulator function or cell identity.

HAVCR2.source_title: Molecular signatures of antitumor neoantigen-reactive T cells from metastatic human cancers
HAVCR2.exact_locator: Results paragraph P14: CD8+ NeoTCR TILs express HAVCR2 with LAG3 and ENTPD1; Fig. 2H and Table S8. Paragraph P16 explicitly evaluates HAVCR2 within minimal activation/dysfunction RNA gene sets.
HAVCR2.claim_scope_limit: Direct source is CD8-specific in this passage; HAVCR2 is also activation-induced and does not establish exhaustion identity or function.
HAVCR2.bounded_rationale: HAVCR2 RNA is associated with a primary human CD8 tumor-reactive dysfunctional T-cell program; it supports a checkpoint-high RNA component but not CD4 transfer, exhaustion identity, or function.

LAG3.source_title: Molecular signatures of antitumor neoantigen-reactive T cells from metastatic human cancers
LAG3.exact_locator: Results paragraph P14; Fig. 2H and Table S8 show LAG3 among genes shared by verified CD4+ and CD8+ NeoTCR-expressing TILs, with an additional explicit CD8 statement. Paragraph P16 evaluates LAG3 in minimal activation/dysfunction RNA gene sets.
LAG3.claim_scope_limit: Tumor/neoantigen-reactive dysfunctional TIL context; LAG3 is also activation-induced and does not by itself establish exhaustion or function.
LAG3.bounded_rationale: LAG3 RNA is part of a primary human CD4/CD8 tumor-reactive dysfunctional T-cell expression program; it supports a checkpoint-high RNA component but not exhaustion identity or function.

TIGIT.source_title: Molecular signatures of antitumor neoantigen-reactive T cells from metastatic human cancers
TIGIT.exact_locator: Results paragraph P14; Fig. 2G-H and Table S8 show TIGIT among genes shared by verified CD4+ and CD8+ NeoTCR-expressing TILs. Paragraph P16 evaluates TIGIT in minimal activation/dysfunction RNA gene sets.
TIGIT.claim_scope_limit: Tumor/neoantigen-reactive dysfunctional TIL context; TIGIT overlaps Treg and activation and does not establish exhaustion or function.
TIGIT.bounded_rationale: TIGIT RNA is part of a primary human CD4/CD8 tumor-reactive dysfunctional T-cell expression program; it supports a checkpoint-high RNA component but not exhaustion identity or function.

ENTPD1.source_title: Molecular signatures of antitumor neoantigen-reactive T cells from metastatic human cancers
ENTPD1.exact_locator: Results paragraph P14; Fig. 2G-H and Table S8 show ENTPD1/CD39 among genes shared by verified CD4+ and CD8+ NeoTCR-expressing TILs, with an additional explicit CD8 statement. Paragraph P16 evaluates ENTPD1 in minimal activation/dysfunction RNA gene sets.
ENTPD1.claim_scope_limit: Tumor/neoantigen-reactive dysfunctional TIL context; ENTPD1 overlaps Treg and activated states and does not establish ectoenzyme function or exhaustion identity.
ENTPD1.bounded_rationale: ENTPD1 RNA is part of a primary human CD4/CD8 tumor-reactive dysfunctional T-cell expression program; it supports a checkpoint-high RNA association without claiming exhaustion identity or ectoenzyme function.

sampling.rule: 50 lowest hashes per occupied marker bin, no replacement

bins_sha256_superseded.note: Historical mean-display hash from the Phase-1 build; the original per-gene bin assignments were never persisted and cannot be reconstructed. Frozen bins are now the committed stage01_bins_v3.csv (method_version stage1-continuous-v3.0.1). Equivalence to the original proven on occupied marker bins: marker_bins + candidate_counts match the checkpoint and all 2,100 controls reconstruct byte-for-byte. Scores/coefficients byte-unchanged.

sensitivity_lanes.scoring_method: cd4_ctl_like_score with a linear activation score regressed out (post-scoring; fit on all 396k)

GNLY.bounded_rationale: Inherited from cd4_ctl_like; activation-residualized SENSITIVITY display, not a separately validated program. stage2_selectable=false (role_sensitivity_display_only).

PRF1.bounded_rationale: Inherited from cd4_ctl_like; activation-residualized SENSITIVITY display, not a separately validated program. stage2_selectable=false (role_sensitivity_display_only).

GZMH.bounded_rationale: Inherited from cd4_ctl_like; activation-residualized SENSITIVITY display, not a separately validated program. stage2_selectable=false (role_sensitivity_display_only).

KLRD1.bounded_rationale: Inherited from cd4_ctl_like: KLRD1 supports only a shared human cytotoxic T-cell RNA association; activation residualization does not create or validate a separate biological program.

GZMB.bounded_rationale: Inherited from cd4_ctl_like; activation-residualized SENSITIVITY display, not a separately validated program. stage2_selectable=false (role_sensitivity_display_only).

NKG7.bounded_rationale: Inherited from cd4_ctl_like; activation-residualized SENSITIVITY display, not a separately validated program. stage2_selectable=false (role_sensitivity_display_only).

CD69.bounded_rationale: Inherited activation-predictor attribution: CD69 RNA is activation-associated in human CD4 T cells; using it for residualization does not validate a separate program or identity.

CD38.bounded_rationale: Inherited activation-predictor attribution: CD38 is activation-associated in human T cells; using its RNA for residualization does not validate a separate program or identity.

MKI67.bounded_rationale: Inherited activation-predictor attribution: MKI67 RNA tracks cycling stimulated T cells; using it for residualization does not validate a separate program or identity.

TNFRSF9.bounded_rationale: Inherited activation-predictor attribution: TNFRSF9 RNA is activation-associated in human CD4 T cells; using it for residualization does not validate a separate program or identity.

IL2RA.bounded_rationale: Inherited activation-predictor attribution: IL2RA RNA is activation-associated but overlaps Treg; using it for residualization does not validate a separate program or identity.

panel_provenance.status_note: Every measured marker-program pair carries a bounded primary-source locator; predictive/associative claims remain suggestive, never confirmatory.
panel_provenance.not_a_scorer_method_revision: Literature/provenance metadata revision only. Panels, gene ids, controls, bins, seeds, coefficients, normalization and all scores are byte-identical; this is an additive panel_provenance sub-schema, not a scorer method_version bump.
panel_provenance.not_a_production_or_selectability_promot: Provenance-only. The frozen 0/33 production-selectability result, overlay/app deployment gates, and the candidate pointer are unchanged.

citations_provenance_note: Per-program `citations` remain program-level references; per-marker PRIMARY provenance is now carried in structured `marker_provenance` and summarized in `panel_provenance`. 53/53 measured marker-program pairs carry a bounded primary-source locator, independently completed by the lineage and state/CTL supplements (artifact SHA-256 in `panel_provenance.source_artifacts`). Intended-only HLA-DRA is excluded from the measured denominator. Masopust 2026 is recorded as a naming framework only and is never attached to any marker as evidence.
